name: SurveyMonkey / Typeform
description: Online survey tools that let campaigns conduct their own research — community surveys, policy feedback forms, volunteer satisfaction surveys, and informal polling at a fraction of professional polling costs.
whyUseIt: Not every campaign can afford professional polling. Survey tools let you gather structured feedback from constituents, test messages, and identify issues — providing directional data that is better than guessing, even if it lacks the rigour of professional research.
aiCapabilities: AI question suggestions, automated analysis, sentiment detection in open-ended responses
funnelPosition: Research — informing strategy at any stage
marketerWorkflow: Design a 10-question community survey on local priorities, distribute via email list and social media, analyse results by demographic segment, present findings to campaign strategy team
managerExpects: Quarterly community survey results showing issue priorities, satisfaction with representation, and emerging concerns

vocabulary.definition: When survey respondents are not representative of the broader population — common in online surveys
A rating scale (e.g., strongly agree to strongly disagree) commonly used in surveys

beginnerMistakes: Treating self-selected online survey results as representative of the whole electorate
Asking leading questions that push respondents toward a desired answer
